name: Almonty Industries Inc.
analysis: Price has pulled back and is testing the 34 EMA at A$26.1359. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$25.9369 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$26.1359, stop A$21.0573, target A$29.0500. Risk/reward is 0.57:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
